Bash(grep -E '"name":\\s*"\(Edit|Write\)"' ~/.claude/projects/-home-loops/fa5f8133-e581-4785-981c-4ba2d8f3aeba.jsonl | jq -r '.message.input | select\(.file_path | contains\("hyde"\) or contains\("Hyde"\) or contains\("HYDE"\)\)' 2>/dev/null)
